messages.content: rewrite this they should use all their vacation before the year end but if they are too busy to take leave we can transfer only 2 days only for exception cases

It is recommended that individuals utilize their entire vacation allotment before the conclusion of the year. However, if they find themselves too occupied to take time off, we can accommodate exception cases by transferring a maximum of only 2 days.
rewrite this  rewrite this they should use all their vacation before the year end but in exception cases we can transfer leaves but still we didnt decided how many days to transfer

In order to fully make use of their vacation time, individuals are encouraged to exhaust all their allotted days before the end of the year. However, for exceptional cases where taking leave becomes challenging, we do offer the option to transfer some days. At this time, the exact number of days eligible for transfer is yet to be determined.
rewrite this they should use the unused vacation days before the year ends.only In exceptional cases, we can allow to transfer some of leaves, but we have not decided how many days yet.

It is essential for individuals to utilize any remaining vacation days before the end of the year. In exceptional circumstances, we do have the flexibility to allow the transfer of unused leaves. However, the specific number of days eligible for transfer has not yet been determined.
rewrite this all remaining vacation days should be taken before the year is over. We can only make an exception for some cases  but we have not decided how many days yet

It is mandatory to take all remaining vacation days before the year concludes. However, in certain exceptional cases, we may make allowances, but the number of days permitted for such exceptions has not been determined yet.

rewrite this short and clear Dear [Staff's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. As the Human Resources team, we want to express our deep concern and care for all of you during these challenging times. The ongoing conflicts and difficult situations in neighboring countries and around the world have undoubtedly added a layer of stress and uncertainty to our lives. We want to assure you that your wellbeing and mental health are of utmost importance to us.

In light of the current circumstances, we want to offer flexibility in your working hours to accommodate your needs and alleviate any additional stress you may be experiencing. Please feel free to discuss your working schedule with your immediate supervisor or HR, and we will do our best to support your individual circumstances.

If you find that you need a break for stress relief or if you simply need some time to recharge, please don't hesitate to request leave. We understand the importance of taking care of your mental and emotional health, and we encourage you to make use of your available leave days.

Moreover, we've established a dedicated support system for all our employees. If you feel the need to talk to someone or require assistance, our HR team is here to provide guidance and support. Additionally, we can connect you with professional psychological support resources if that's something you feel would be beneficial.

Your mental and emotional wellbeing are integral to the success of our organization, and we want to ensure that you have the necessary support during these trying times. Please remember that you are not alone, and we are here to assist you in any way we can.

Feel free to reach out to us with any concerns or requests. We're committed to creating a supportive and caring work environment for all our staff.

Thank you for your hard work and dedication, and please take good care of yourselves.

Best regards,

Dear [Staff's Name],

We hope you are well during these challenging times. As the HR team, we want to express our concern for your wellbeing. The conflicts happening in neighboring countries and worldwide have added stress and uncertainty to our lives. Your mental health is important to us.

Given the current circumstances, we are offering flexibility in your working hours to ease any additional stress. Please discuss your schedule with your supervisor or HR, and we will support you based on your individual circumstances.

If you need a break for stress relief or recharge, feel free to request leave. Taking care of your mental and emotional health is vital, and we encourage you to use your available leave days.

We have established a support system for all employees. If you need someone to talk to or require assistance, our HR team is here for guidance and support. We can also connect you with professional psychological resources if needed.

Your wellbeing contributes to our organization's success, and we are here to support you. Remember that you are not alone.

Feel free to reach out with any concerns or requests. We are committed to creating a supportive work environment.

Thank you for your dedication. Take care of yourselves.

Best regards,

rewrite this in professional 
Dear Staff Member,
 
I hope this message finds you well. As the INTERSOS Jordan mission management, we want to express our deep concern and care for all of you during these challenging times. The ongoing conflicts and difficult situations in neighboring countries and around the world have undoubtedly added a layer of stress and uncertainty to our lives. We want to assure you that your well-being and mental health are of utmost importance to us.
 
In light of the current circumstances, we want to offer flexibility in your working hours or working from home to accommodate your needs and alleviate any additional stress you may be experiencing. Please feel free to discuss your working schedule with your immediate supervisor or HR, and we will do our best to support your circumstances.
 
If you find that you need a break for stress relief or if you simply need some time to recharge, please don't hesitate to request leave. We understand the importance of taking care of your mental and emotional health, and we encourage you to make use of your available leave days.
 
Moreover, we've established a dedicated support system for all our employees. If you feel the need to talk to someone or require assistance, our HR is here to provide guidance and support. Additionally, we can connect you with professional psychological support resources if that's something you feel would be beneficial.
 
Your mental and emotional well-being is integral to the success of our organization, and we want to ensure that you have the necessary support during these trying times. Please remember that you are not alone, and we are here to assist you in any way we can.
 
Feel free to reach out to us with any concerns or requests. We're committed to creating a supportive and caring work environment for all our staff.
 
Attached are some Stress-release materials.  We encourage you to read and apply.  
 
Thank you for your hard work and dedication, and please take good care of yourselves.

Dear Staff Member,

I hope this message finds you in good health. As the management of INTERSOS Jordan mission, we want to express our genuine concern and care for all staff members during these challenging times. The ongoing conflicts and difficult situations in neighboring countries and around the world have undoubtedly added significant stress and uncertainty to our lives. Please rest assured that your well-being and mental health are our top priorities.

Considering the current circumstances, we would like to offer flexibility in your working hours, including the option to work from home, to accommodate your needs and mitigate any additional stress you may be experiencing. We kindly encourage you to discuss your working schedule with your immediate supervisor or HR, as we will make every effort to support your individual circumstances.

Should you require a break for stress relief or simply need some time to recharge, please do not hesitate to request leave. We fully understand the crucial importance of taking care of your mental and emotional health, and we strongly encourage you to utilize your available leave days accordingly.

Furthermore, we have established a dedicated support system for all our employees. If you feel the need to speak with someone or require any form of assistance, our HR department is here to provide you with the necessary guidance and support. Additionally, if you believe it would be beneficial, we can connect you with professional psychological support resources.

We firmly believe that your mental and emotional well-being is crucial to the success of our organization, and we are determined to ensure that you receive the necessary support during these challenging times. Please remember that you are not alone, and we are here to assist you in any way we can.

Please do not hesitate to reach out to us with any concerns or requests you may have. We are strongly committed to creating a supportive and caring work environment for all staff members.

Attached to this message, you will find some stress-release materials that we encourage you to read and apply.

Once again, thank you for your unwavering dedication and hard work. Please take good care of yourselves.

Best regards,
what could be the subject to the above eamil
Subject: Support and Flexibility for Staff during Challenging Times
Subject: Prioritizing Staff Well-being and Flexibility in Current Circumstances

could please write this in arabic Dear Colleagues,

We hope you are well in these hard times. As the INTERSOS Jordan management, we care about you and your wellbeing. We know that the conflicts and crises in the region and the world have caused a lot of stress and worry for you. We want you to know that your mental health is our main concern.

We want to give you some flexibility in your working hours, including working from home, to suit your needs and reduce your stress. You can talk to your supervisor or HR about your working schedule, and we will try to support you as much as we can.

If you need a break or some time off, please feel free to ask for leave. We understand that you need to take care of yourself and your emotions, and we want you to use your leave days.

We also have a support system for you. If you want to talk to someone or get help, our HR team is here for you. We can also help you get professional psychological support if you want.

Your wellbeing is essential for our organization, and we want to make sure you have the support you need in these hard times. Please remember that you are not alone, and we are here to help you in any way possible.

Please contact us if you have any concerns or requests. We want to create a supportive and caring work environment for you.

Please see the attached materials for some stress-release tips.

Thank you for your work and dedication, and please take care of yourself.

Best regards,

عزيزي الزملاء،

نأمل أن تكونوا بأفضل حال في هذه الأوقات الصعبة. كفريق إدارة INTERSOS الأردن ، نهتم بكم وبرفاهيتكم. ندرك أن النزاعات والأزمات في المنطقة والعالم قد تسببت في الكثير من الضغوط والقلق لكم. نريدكم أن تعلموا أن صحتكم العقلية هي أهتمامنا الأساسي.

نود أن نمنحكم بعض المرونة في ساعات العمل الخاصة بكم، بما في ذلك العمل من المنزل، لتتناسب مع احتياجاتكم وتقليل الضغوط. يمكنكم التحدث مع مشرفكم المباشر أو إدارة الموارد البشرية بخصوص جدول العمل الخاص بكم، وسنحاول دعمكم بقدر المستطاع.

إذا كنتم بحاجة إلى استراحة أو بعض الوقت للراحة، فلا تترددوا في طلب إجازة. نحن ندرك أهمية الاعتناء بنفسكم ومشاعركم، ونود منكم استخدام أيام الإجازة المتاحة لديكم.

لدينا أيضًا نظام لدعمكم. إذا كنتم ترغبون في التحدث مع شخص ما أو الحصول على مساعدة، ففريق الموارد البشرية هنا من أجلكم. يمكننا أيضًا مساعدتكم في الحصول على الدعم النفسي المهني إذا رغبتم في ذلك.

رفاهيتكم أمر أساسي لمؤسستنا، ونرغب في التأكد من أنكم تحصلون على الدعم الذي تحتاجونه في هذه الأوقات الصعبة. يرجى تذكر أنكم لستم وحدكم، ونحن هنا لمساعدتكم بأي طريقة ممكنة.

يرجى التواصل معنا إذا كان لديكم أي مخاوف أو طلبات. نود إنشاء بيئة عمل داعمة ورعاية لكم.

يرجى الاطلاع على المرفقات لتلقي بعض النصائح للتخلص من التوتر والقلق.

نشكركم على عملكم وتفانيكم، ويرجى أخذ الحيطة بأنفسكم.

مع خالص التحية،
